command:
python3 -c "
import json, urllib.request, time

tok = '8363191602:AAGVXfJKqNGNhyS-EuxEl8CKRcUyjqIGtPE'

print('=== DELETE WEBHOOK (drop pending updates) ===')
r = urllib.request.urlopen(
    f'https://api.telegram.org/bot{tok}/deleteWebhook?drop_pending_updates=true', timeout=10)
d = json.loads(r.read())
print('deleteWebhook:', d)

print()
print('=== WAIT 5s ===')
time.sleep(5)

print('=== RE-REGISTER WEBHOOK ===')
payload = json.dumps({
    'url': 'https://remy.cutegrafiks.com/telegram-webhook',
    'allowed_updates': ['message', 'callback_query'],
    'secret_token': ''
}).encode()
req = urllib.request.Request(
    f'https://api.telegram.org/bot{tok}/setWebhook',
    data=payload, method='POST',
    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'})
r = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10)
d = json.loads(r.read())
print('setWebhook:', d)

print()
print('=== WAIT 10s FOR PROPAGATION ===')
time.sleep(10)

print('=== CHECK WEBHOOK STATUS ===')
r = urllib.request.urlopen(
    f'https://api.telegram.org/bot{tok}/getWebhookInfo', timeout=10)
d = json.loads(r.read())
wh = d.get('result', {})
print('url:', wh.get('url','NONE'))
print('pending_updates:', wh.get('pending_update_count', 0))
print('last_error:', wh.get('last_error_message', 'none'))
print('last_error_date:', wh.get('last_error_date', 0))
print()
if not wh.get('last_error_message'):
    print('REMY WEBHOOK: HEALTHY - no errors')
else:
    print('REMY WEBHOOK: ERROR -', wh.get('last_error_message'))
"
